name: exobrain
description: Your AI work partner — zero industry preset, learns from your materials. Each project makes you smarter for the next.

displayDescription.en: Your AI work partner. Zero industry preset, learns from your materials. Manages intake, context loading, and retrospective-driven evolution.
displayDescription.zh: 你的AI工作搭档，零预设、全自适应，从你的材料中学习工作模式，让每次干活不必从零开始。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我搭一套知识库结构，这是我的第一批材料
defaultInitPrompt.en: Help me set up a knowledge base structure, here's my first batch of materials

quickPrompts.en: Help me set up a knowledge base structure, here's my first batch of materials
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我搭一套知识库结构，这是我的第一批材料

quickPrompts.en: Let me start working, load relevant context for me
quickPrompts.zh: 开始干活，帮我加载相关上下文

quickPrompts.en: Retrospect this project and update the knowledge base
quickPrompts.zh: 复盘这个项目，更新知识库
